channel.title: World News, Today World News, Latest International News, World Breaking News, Trending News of World - Times of India
channel.description: World News Today: Read the latest world news headlines, Current International breaking news world wide. In depth analysis and top news headlines world wide.
channel.copyright: Copyright:(C) Thu, 11 Jun 2026 07:15:20 IST Bennett Coleman & Co. Ltd, http://in.indiatimes.com/policyterms/1554651.cms

image.title: World News, Today World News, Latest International News, World Breaking News, Trending News of World - Times of India

item.title: "Ruined his face": Looksmaxxing streamer Clavicular brutally roasted after unrecognizable surgery reveal
item.description: Looksmaxxing influencer Clavicular is facing heavy backlash after revealing the results of his rhinoplasty online. Before-and-after photos of the surgery quickly went viral, with many fans claiming he “ruined his face” and lost the distinct look that made him famous. Others defended the transformation, arguing the results may still be affected by swelling. The controversy has also reignited criticism surrounding the extreme beauty standards and risky lifestyle promoted within the online looksmaxxing community.
item.dc:creator: Barsha Dutta

item.title: "Erica was described as an emotional asset": Candace Owens keeps pressure on officials over controversial Erika Kirk email
item.description: Candace Owens says she is intensifying her FOIA fight over a controversial White House Correspondents’ Dinner email that allegedly described Erika Kirk as an “emotional asset” shortly after a shooting incident. Owens claimed government departments initially rejected her request as too broad, prompting her team to submit a narrower version with specific names and dates. She also accused Andrew Colvett and others of misleading the public, insisting the leaked email is authentic and will eventually be verified.
item.dc:creator: Barsha Dutta

item.title: What really happened to Reckless Ben’s GoFundMe amid the missing LEGO collection controversy?
item.description: The Bricks & Minifigs and Reckless Ben dispute began with claims that a $200,000 Star Wars LEGO collection was never returned to the Mansell family. The controversy later expanded into arrests, public accusations, lawsuits, store closures, and a major fundraising campaign. The latest development saw the Mansell GoFundMe page restored, while the legal battle continues ahead of a scheduled June 30 hearing.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: Are PlaqueBoyMax and Huda dating? Love Island USA star fuels fresh rumours with streamer
item.description: PlaqueBoyMax and Huda Mustafa have sparked dating rumors after appearing together in livestreams, music sessions, gym posts, and social media content. The speculation grew following Huda’s breakup with Louis Russell. However, neither creator has confirmed a relationship. For now, publicly available information points to a close friendship and successful creative partnership rather than a confirmed romance.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: TheBurntPeanut finally reveals Fortnite crossover after weeks of rumors
item.description: Popular streamer TheBurntPeanut has confirmed his Fortnite collaboration, not as a skin, but as an exceptionally rare in-game Sprite companion. This unique buddy, with a mere 1.5% drop rate, offers gameplay advantages like increased rewards, including Mythic weapons. Players can extract and reuse the Sprite in future matches, even piloting mech skins.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: Video of Jesse Ridgway portraying character with Down syndrome resurfaces after announcement
item.description: YouTuber Jesse Ridgway faces renewed scrutiny. An old video showing him portraying a character with Down syndrome has resurfaced. This comes after Ridgway announced he and his wife terminated a pregnancy after their unborn child was diagnosed with Trisomy 21. The resurfaced clip, from his series 'The Devil Inside', depicts exaggerated mannerisms.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: Trump administration cracks down on ‘birth tourism’, revokes hundreds of visas
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Indian national Sandeep Singh arrested by ICE in California; may face deportation
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Perth comedian Jasky Singh claims he was banned from venues in Australia: 'I'm frustrated'
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Soulja Boy starts Rapper University following public feud with Kai Cenat over Streamer University spot
item.description: Soulja Boy has launched Rapper University after publicly expressing interest in joining Kai Cenat’s Streamer University 2026. The rapper announced the Twitch-based project on X and shared an AI-generated promotional poster. While applications for Kai’s event remain open, Soulja Boy is now inviting aspiring artists to apply for his own program, which he says will be filmed in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: 24-year-old PhD student spotted a strange signal from space and uncovered one of astronomy's greatest discoveries
item.dc:creator: TOI Science Desk

item.title: “I pray she’s my wife”: Sneako shares his thoughts on Kai Trump as viral video grabs internet attention
item.description: Streamer Sneako sparked debate online after a viral reaction video showed him commenting on Kai Trump. In the clip, he called her “every Muslim’s dream girl” and said, “I pray she’s my wife.” Shared by Coinvo on X, the video drew mixed reactions, with some viewers finding it humorous while others criticized the comments and discussed the age difference.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: Quote of the day by Elizabeth Fry: "Punishment is not for revenge, but to lessen..."
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Twitch streamer Kathelina breaks silence after Imnotkenneth cheating claims as viral litter box camera controversy grows
item.description: Twitch streamer Kathelina has responded to the viral controversy involving her former boyfriend, Imnotkenneth. While apologizing for her actions, she denied several rumors circulating online and said the incident was recent. Kathelina also accused Kenneth of abusive behavior during their relationship and discussed her mental health struggles, saying she plans to seek help and return to streaming in the future.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: ‘I gave up my H1-B visa...’: Ex-Microsoft worker explains why he left US and returned to India
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk
